## Summary

Describe the proposed change and the affected paper or repository component.

## Classification

- [ ] Mathematical correction
- [ ] Independent verification
- [ ] Prior-art or citation update
- [ ] Reproducibility/build change
- [ ] Editorial or accessibility correction
- [ ] Repository administration

## Affected material

Paper identifier, version, file paths, theorem/section/page references:

## Evidence and validation

Explain how the change was checked. Include exact commands and output where applicable.

## Publication impact

- [ ] No change to mathematical conclusions
- [ ] Changes exposition but not conclusions
- [ ] Changes a lemma or intermediate result
- [ ] Changes a principal theorem or claimed resolution
- [ ] Requires a new paper version
- [ ] Requires withdrawal or status change

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not silently replace a canonical released artifact.
- [ ] Mathematical and editorial changes are separated where practical.
- [ ] New code is deterministic or documents randomness.
- [ ] Relevant tests and verification steps pass.
- [ ] Citations and third-party rights have been checked.
